input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.6
            TITLE: connections to intake

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.6: Connections to Intake
IC.2.6 Connections to Intake 
Any crankcase or engine lubrication vent lines routed to the intake system must be connected 
upstream of the intake system restrictor.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 80 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Any crankcase or engine lubrication vent lines routed to the intake system must be connected upstream of the intake system restrictor.
